blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Chose the comparison operator that matches your alert
- Set a threshold value that triggers the alert
- Previewed the condition against current data

---

### More to explore (optional)

Read more about how you can:

- [Configure alert queries and conditions](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/alert-rules/queries-conditions/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following path next:

- [Create your first alert rule - labels and evaluation](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-first-rule-labels/)
